diagrams.title: Instruction Cycle Flowchart
diagrams.description: Shows the four phases of instruction execution: Fetch, Decode, Execute, Store with arrows indicating the cyclic nature
diagrams.purpose: Understand how CPU processes instructions step by step and the data flow between components

diagrams.title: Memory Hierarchy Pyramid
diagrams.description: Inverted pyramid showing memory types from fastest/smallest to slowest/largest
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the trade-off between speed, cost, and capacity in memory design

diagrams.title: CPU Architecture Block Diagram
diagrams.description: Internal structure of CPU showing ALU, Control Unit, Registers, and their interconnections
diagrams.purpose: Understand how CPU components work together to execute instructions

diagrams.title: Dual-Mode Operation
diagrams.description: Shows the transition between User Mode and Kernel Mode with system calls and interrupts
elements: Mode Bit (0 for kernel, 1 for user)
diagrams.purpose: Understand security mechanism that protects OS from user programs
